_comment: DO NOT EDIT: THIS IS MY BIRB EGG! WHY ARE WE YELLING?? - DJ STOMP
name: FourthEye
author: 85457381+DJStompZone@users.noreply.github.com
description: FourthEye Discord <-> Minecraft Bedrock bridge using Node.js 20 and a RakNet-capable Docker image. Startup v2 self-heals missing install files and writes config.js directly from egg variables before launching start.js.

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: Repository to clone for FourthEye.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch to install from.

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: Discord bot token used by FourthEye. Treat this like a password, because it basically is one.

variables.name: Discord Guild ID
variables.description: Discord server/guild ID.

variables.name: Discord Channel ID
variables.description: Primary Discord channel ID for Minecraft chat relay.

variables.name: Discord Admin IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated Discord user IDs allowed to use FourthEye admin commands.

variables.name: Minecraft Username
variables.description: Minecraft/Xbox profile username for the Bedrock bot.

variables.name: Offline Auth
variables.description: Use offline authentication for Bedrock protocol. Keep false for Microsoft/Xbox auth.

variables.name: BDS Host
variables.description: Bedrock Dedicated Server IP or hostname. Ignored when IS_REALM is true.

variables.name: BDS Port
variables.description: Bedrock Dedicated Server UDP port. Ignored when IS_REALM is true.

variables.name: Is Realm
variables.description: Connect to a Realm instead of a hosted Bedrock Dedicated Server.

variables.name: Realm Invite Code
variables.description: Realm invite code. Only used when IS_REALM is true.

variables.name: Bedrock Version
variables.description: Optional Bedrock protocol version override. Leave blank for auto-detection.

variables.name: Skip Server Ping
variables.description: Skip the Bedrock server ping before connecting.

variables.name: Command Prefix
variables.description: Discord command prefix used by FourthEye.

variables.name: System Commands Channel ID
variables.description: Optional Discord channel ID for system command logs.

variables.name: Log System Commands
variables.description: Enable system command logging.

variables.name: Use System Join Message
variables.description: Use Minecraft's system player join message as a backup join detector.

variables.name: Use Embeds
variables.description: Send Discord relay messages as embeds.

variables.name: Embed Title
variables.description: Discord embed title.

variables.name: Embed RGB Color
variables.description: Embed color as R,G,B, for example 0,255,0.

variables.name: Logo URL
variables.description: Optional logo URL for Discord embeds.

variables.name: Debug Logging
variables.description: Enable verbose packet/debug logging. This can get loud as hell.
